objective: Launch-ready product hardening with continuous source-backed AutoResearch A/B loops, GitHub project comparison, direct app-click QA, commit/push evidence, and no global stop until the user explicitly stops.

global_completion_policy.reason: The user requested a continuous self-improvement loop until an explicit stop. Current cycles can be complete, but the global objective remains active.

criteria.requirement: Product launch hardening has a clean-worktree all-scope proof.
GitHub-related similar projects are tracked and mapped to local evidence.
The active launch proof is checked against the current remote branch so product-code changes after the proof invalidate cycle readiness.
GitHub-related modernization sources have a live repository metadata freshness snapshot.
The GitHub source freshness snapshot has a recent generated_at timestamp and passing status so old external-source evidence cannot satisfy the launch cycle indefinitely.
GitHub source freshness fails when a tracked repository is archived, disabled, or missing core repository metadata.
GitHub source freshness marks unauthenticated API rate-limit refreshes as partial token-required failures and keeps them separate from complete source snapshots.
Live GitHub source refreshes compare current repository metadata against the last adopted snapshot so upstream movement becomes an actionable continuous-research signal.
Changed GitHub source metadata is ranked into an actionable review queue for the next source-backed AutoResearch adoption decision.

must_contain: Review upstream commits or release notes
Review upstream commits or release notes

criteria.requirement: Highest-priority queued GitHub source code movements are reviewed against live commit subjects before a local adoption decision.

must_contain: GitHub Source Commit Digest Batch Guard

criteria.requirement: GitHub commit digest fallback handles non-main default branch Atom feeds without failing live source digest.
GitHub source commit-digest timestamp filtering normalizes GitHub ISO timestamps to naive UTC before comparing source windows.

must_contain: PLTF-2899: store GitHub PR timestamps as naive UTC (asyncpg DataError)

criteria.requirement: Canva MCP continuation-capable tools preserve pagination continuation schema, descriptions, and server propagation, with the guard wired into pre-push.
Canva widget state hooks preserve default/local state across continuation-style OpenAI global updates until the host supplies a real widgetState value, with the regression guard wired into pre-push.

must_contain: fix(client-js): keep client tools for signal continuations (#17593)

criteria.requirement: Canva MCP OpenAPI and /tools metadata surfaces preserve OpenAI namespaced metadata keys so widget/tool namespace context cannot be dropped across interop summaries.

must_contain: x-mcp-tools must preserve OpenAI namespaced metadata keys
fix(openai): round-trip namespace on function_call input items (#15193)

criteria.requirement: Canva MCP declares the current locked Model Context Protocol SDK floor so package regeneration cannot silently fall back to an old SDK range.
AutoResearch self-improvement skill exists and enforces A/B, evidence, commit/push, and completion-audit behavior.
Direct browser/app-click QA was performed on launch-critical user surfaces.

must_contain: All Frontends Browser Smoke Expected Text
dashboard, AgriGuard, DeSci, and Canva widget preview

criteria.requirement: Launch-critical app/browser-smoke paths have not changed after the direct browser QA proof baseline.

must_contain: has protected paths changed after proof commit
no changed protected paths after proof
no changed protected paths after proof

criteria.requirement: Browser smoke runs use an explicit ephemeral browser context and report that they do not rely on a persistent profile.
The dashboard Quality panel surfaces the live verifier next credential unblock without exposing credential values.
The dashboard Quality panel surfaces the first safe live-verifier command for the next credential unblock.
The dashboard Quality panel surfaces the live verifier queue rank, command count, and current blocker status for the next credential unblock.

must_contain: Rank 1 / 2 commands / blocked missing required env
Rank 1 / 2 commands / blocked missing required env
Rank 1 / 2 commands / blocked missing required env

criteria.requirement: The dashboard Quality panel surfaces the live-verifier credential unblock queue beyond the first boundary.
The dashboard Quality panel surfaces the standalone external credential operator checklist readiness from redacted checklist artifacts.

must_contain: Hosted agent runtime and tracing credentials

criteria.requirement: The dashboard credential-boundary API preserves valid falsy operator metadata from redacted credential reports.
Manifest-backed browser smoke reports record which expected text checks matched, not only route pass/fail.

must_contain: Browser Smoke Markdown Expected Text Evidence
All Frontends Browser Smoke Expected Text

criteria.requirement: Browser-smoke reports list unchecked expected text as missing when browser errors prevent page inspection.

must_contain: Tab creation is not supported yet
Browser Smoke Clear-Error Expected Text Guard

criteria.requirement: Accepted variants are recorded, committed, and pushed to the active branch.
The local push gate protects the MCP runtime and completion-critical smoke tests.

must_contain: Canva MCP Pre-Push Typecheck Build Guard

criteria.requirement: The dev-server MCP runtime has a repo-owned subprocess smoke that validates real JSON-RPC stdio behavior.
The dev-server MCP runtime has an in-process smoke mode that validates the same JSON-RPC stdio protocol flow without relying on process launch.

must_contain: Run StreamableHTTP transport tests in process instead of over sockets

criteria.requirement: Repo-local stdio MCP services prove runtime initialize and tools/list readiness against the service manifest.
Repo-local MCP runtime smoke must prove named service tools survive tools/list, not only a minimum count.

must_contain: merge dynamically created tools with bundler-discovered tools

criteria.requirement: The MCP OTLP smoke export has an executable, source-backed collector handoff check without claiming live collector shipping.
MCP trace JSONL export drains all generated trace events even if a future event-stream observer does not consume them.
DeSci upload workflows treat multipart filenames as local labels so URL/path-like client file references do not flow into parser, manifest, response, or indexing metadata surfaces.
Declared agent workflow quality gates can be executed through existing project CLIs without claiming full autonomous orchestration.
Side-effecting workflow gates are skipped by default in execute mode unless an operator explicitly allows them.
All declared launch workflows can be verified through a safe deterministic gate matrix.
Agent workflow gate matrices can be routed by manifest smoke scope without broadening execution beyond the selected launch surface.
The launch workflow matrix reuses duplicate deterministic gate results without hiding per-workflow evidence.
Transient AutoResearch/browser-smoke artifacts under var stay local-only so repeated self-improvement cycles do not pollute commit and push decisions.
Unfinished or credential-bound work is explicitly tracked instead of hidden behind green tests.
Credential-gated and operator-owned launch boundaries are machine-readable and executable without exposing secret values.
Credential-gated operator actions have a redacted handoff package with env names, verification commands, and no secret values.

must_contain: Fill values locally; do not commit populated secrets.

criteria.requirement: Credential-gated operator actions have a standalone machine-readable checklist with readiness, blockers, env names, and verification commands.
Credential-gated operator commands can be planned and safely executed only after required env is present.
Hosted-agent runtime checks require an explicit operator approval marker before any ready-only execution can claim runtime readiness.

must_contain: Python: Fix toolbox consent flow in hosted agent (#6249)

criteria.requirement: Hosted-agent runtime boundaries preserve each operator consent target instead of collapsing toolbox/runtime approval into a single boundary-level marker.

must_contain: approval_env must be an env-var-like string
Python: Fix toolbox consent flow in hosted agent (#6249)

criteria.requirement: Telegram notification credentials have a redacted live delivery verifier instead of relying on tools/list smoke as delivery proof.

must_contain: do not claim notification delivery complete from tools/list smoke alone

criteria.requirement: The original user prompt is mapped to concrete artifacts, completion criteria, and explicit blockers.
Checked-in GitHub source freshness snapshot matches the current modernization source manifest and renderer output.

must_contain: GitHub Source Snapshot Manifest Drift Guard

criteria.requirement: Checked-in GitHub modernization radar report matches the current modernization source manifest and renderer output.

must_contain: Keep the default smoke gate deterministic and offline

criteria.requirement: Checked-in AutoResearch objective coverage artifacts match the current requirements manifest and renderer output.
The GitHub Actions workspace smoke workflow runs branch-portable AutoResearch audit regression tests so audit artifact drift is caught in CI.

must_contain: Workspace Smoke CI AutoResearch Audit Tests

criteria.requirement: Pull-request analysis can run as a read-only automation lane separate from the write-capable PR triage comment workflow.

must_contain: No PR comment or mutation is required
No PR comment or mutation is required
Separate PR analysis from triage for automation

criteria.requirement: Checked-in AutoResearch completion audit summary artifacts match the current completion contract and renderer output.
getdaytrends process lock path can be overridden for operator/runtime isolation without changing the default lockfile behavior.
shared harness token-budget denials expose structured audit metadata while preserving TokenBudgetExceededError behavior.

must_contain: fix: surface MaxTokensError when max_tokens truncates tool input JSON

criteria.requirement: The dev-server MCP runtime proves an MCP tool error does not drop the stdio session or block later requests.

must_contain: get_devserver_logs must succeed after a prior MCP tool error
tools: Prevent session drop on MCP tool error

criteria.requirement: Agent workflow gate reports snapshot manifest-derived nested state so callers cannot mutate the loaded workflow manifest through returned reports.

must_contain: fix(workflow): deep copy initial_state to prevent mutation leaks across runs

must_contain: **({"seed": policy.seed} if policy.seed is not None else {})

criteria.requirement: Agent-facing Vibe Coding file tools confine reads and writes to repo-relative workspace paths.

must_contain: block path traversal in Agent Builder file tools

criteria.requirement: DeSci job progress streams expose a final partial=false terminal frame so SSE clients can distinguish completion from partial progress frames.

must_contain: event["partial"] is True for event in events[:-1]
DeSci Job Stream Partial False Guard

criteria.requirement: MCP workspace-smoke JSONL trace exports end with an explicit final partial=false event.

must_contain: final partial=False frame is always yielded

criteria.requirement: DailyNews NotebookLM export and weekly digest audio artifact generation route through the audio artifact method and degrade safely when audio generation is unavailable.
DailyNews NotebookLM weekly/export artifact requests treat speech/text-to-speech aliases as the canonical audio artifact without duplicate generation.
The read-only PR analysis workflow can be manually rerun from pull-request comments without enabling comment mutation.
Credential-gated actions are not claimed complete without real user credentials.
criteria.blocker: Canva OAuth and live OpenAPI execution require real user login/consent and proxy authentication decisions.
